title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXII. Paradoxes.
content:
There was an old woman had nothing,
        And there came thieves to rob her;
    When she cried out she made no noise,
        But all the country heard her.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXII. Paradoxes.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
